violations.text: Working containers of sauces are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025

The door to the outside, located in the dining room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the prep units and cold drawers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The bar glass chillers have an accumulation of ice at bottom shelf. PIC stated units are scheduled for deep clean today. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025
The dumpster area has an accumulation of leaf litter and debris. Refuse areas shall be maintained free of debris to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The sink & surface concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink at the bar and in buckets was 272/704 parts per million (ppm) as indicated on the test strip. The concentration of sink and surface in the sanitizing solution must be between 272/704 and 700/1875 ppm. Buckets and sink were refilled to proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
Staff were observed handling clean and sanitized drinkware, touching the lip surface, with bare hands. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep units and cold drawers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2023

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. PIC stated a work order was placed on 12/3/2023. All equipment and utensils in the kitchen are to be sanitized in the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the table beneath the grill, and cold drawers have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. The cooler used for storing bar glasses has an accumulation of soil residue, debris, and glass shards. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (vegetable slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Vegetable slicer was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

Cooked onions observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

Limes were not washed before being cut. Raw fruits and vegetables must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils (blender bowl) are not stored inverted. Water observed in blender bowl, and in stacked plastic bar cups. After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
Clean kitchen towels observed stored on the floor in the manager's office. Clean towels must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

Bar glasses observed stored inverted in bar glass refrigerator with the lip contact surface submerged in unclean stagnant water at the bottom of the unit. Bar glasses were taken to be cleaned and sanitized, and the bar glass storage unit is to be cleaned and sanitized before storing glasses inside. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris: prep units cold drawer units the area beneath the grill the floor drying fan the storage table for the floor drying fan The bar glass storage unit has an accumulation of dirty stagnant water. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
Two lights beneath the hood were nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2023
